characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The star of the show. A 5-year-old girl from San Antonio, Texas who wants to learn about the world around her. Affectionate Nickname: Rosie's mom calls her "Rosie Posie." All Girls Like Ponies: Rosie loves unicorns, and wanted to buy a unicorn squeaky toy for Crystal's bunny. Breaking the Fourth Wall: Rosie talks to the viewers when she tells them her rules. Catchphrase: Rosie has many catchphrases, which includes "Well, that's new information!", "I need to flop," "Mama macaroni!", "Wait a secamadoodle," "Nada, empanada," and "Ciao, bacalao."

characters.name: Rosie
characters.description: The star of the show. A 5-year-old girl from San Antonio, Texas who wants to learn about the world around her. Affectionate Nickname: Rosie's mom calls her "Rosie Posie." All Girls Like Ponies: Rosie loves unicorns, and wanted to buy a unicorn squeaky toy for Crystal's bunny. Breaking the Fourth Wall: Rosie talks to the viewers when she tells them her rules. Catchphrase: Rosie has many catchphrases, which includes "Well, that's new information!", "I need to flop," "Mama macaroni!", "Wait a secamadoodle," "Nada, empanada," and "Ciao, bacalao."

characters.name: Gatita
characters.description: The family cat, and Rosie's sidekick. Animal Jingoism: Gatita is initially scared of Benito, a dog. However, they become friends later on. Cute Kitten: She's an adorable and very fluffy cat. A Dog Named "Perro": Gatita means "kitten" in Spanish. Human Mail: In "Cat Mail," Rosie tries to send Gatita to Mexico in the mail.

characters.name: Iggy
characters.description: Rosie's 2-year-old brother. Affectionate Nickname: Crystal calls him "Iggy Wiggy." Baby Talk: He replaces his R's with W's and talks in the third person. Borrowed Catchphrase: The episode "Rosie & Javi’s Museum" has Iggy flopping instead of Rosie, making it the first time someone else flops other than her.Iggy: Ugh! Iggy want to be dino, but Wosie say ‘no dinos in space’, and…..!Rosie: Iggy, doyouneed to flop?Iggy: Yes! (Flops)Rosie: Rosie’s Rule: Sometimes even little brothers need to flop. Companion Cube: Iggy has a stuffed axolotl named Lote, and sometimes blames his actions on the toy.Rosie: Iggy! Did you eat one of our ingredients?!Iggy: Lote did it.

characters.name: Crystal
characters.description: Rosie and Iggy's 12-year-old half-sister, and Liz's biological daughter. Liz and Marco got married when Crystal was little. Calling Parents by Their Name: Crystal always calls her father 'Marco,' but this isn't out of rudeness, it's because he's her step-father. Catchphrase: "I'm creaaating~!" and "Take it from me, I'm 12." Cool Big Sis: Crystal uses her creative spirit to help Rosie solve problems. Kiddie Kid: Implied for the sake of a joke, when Crystal boasts about how she's 12 and very grown up, only to squeal seconds later when she sees balloon animals.

characters.name: Marco
characters.description: Big Ol' Eyebrows: He has very thick eyebrows compared to the rest of the cast. Catchphrase: "Que pasa, calabaza?" Delayed Reaction: A master of these.In "Cat Mail," Rosie sends Gatita in the mail, and says goodbye to her as the mail truck leaves. Marco does the same until he realizes what he just said.In "Rosie's Twin Day," Rosie tells Marco that she's going to find a twin. To that, Marco says "Muy bien," only to then go "Wait, what?" In "Cat Mail," Rosie sends Gatita in the mail, and says goodbye to her as the mail truck leaves. Marco does the same until he realizes what he just said. In "Rosie's Twin Day," Rosie tells Marco that she's going to find a twin. To that, Marco says "Muy bien," only to then go "Wait, what?"

characters.name: Liz
characters.description: Affectionate Nickname: In "Sister Surprise," Marco calls her "Cielo." Bookworm: If nothing else, her official description states that she owns a bookstore and loves finding the perfect book for someone. Some of the show's interstitial segments also show her reading books. Good Parents: She's a loving mother to her children, as well as a good person in general. Hair of Gold, Heart of Gold: She has golden-blonde hair, and is agood parent to her kids. Hairstyle Inertia:An old photo◊shown in "Mom's Snowy Day" shows that she's always had the hairstyle she does now.
